final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a sakura-season school campus scene.

Style/medium: needs a "清新日系" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Makoto Shinkai film backgrounds, Studio Ghibli pastoral school scenes, 1980s Japanese city pop illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a young woman in 水手服 standing in front of a school building
Scene/backdrop: must include a school campus during sakura season with falling pink cherry blossoms, 教学楼 visible
Lighting/mood: needs a bright sunny spring atmosphere with gentle breeze — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink-forward spring direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
